---
name: MCP Contract Change
about: Propose or report a SendLens MCP response contract change
labels: mcp-contract
---

## Tool or surface

Which MCP tool or response shape is affected?

## Current shape

What does it return today?

## Proposed or expected shape

What should change?

## Compatibility

- [ ] Additive change
- [ ] Breaking key rename/removal
- [ ] Warning/cap/readiness behavior change
- [ ] Evidence-class behavior change

## Required updates

- [ ] `docs/MCP_RESPONSE_CONTRACT.md`
- [ ] runtime tests
- [ ] prompt/behavior tests
- [ ] skill or agent guidance

## Ownership check

MCP response semantics belong in SendLens. Host transport or structured-content portability belongs in Pluxx.
